message:
fix: verify bead worktree state before unhooking stale hooks (gt-ajx6l)

The stale hook scanner now checks the agent worktree for uncommitted
changes and unpushed commits before unhooking a bead. Results are recorded
in StaleHookResult fields (PartialWork, WorktreeDirty, UnpushedCount) so
downstream consumers can flag partially-completed work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
